blood.description: A dark guardian who manipulates and corrupts life energy to sustain themselves in the face of an enemy onslaught. Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Axe, Mace, Sword

left.name: San'layn
left.description: San'layn excel at using blood and shadow magic to weaken their enemies and empower their own capabilities.

right.name: Deathbringer
right.description: Become the emissary of death. Aim for the soul of your enemies with attacks empowered by the Shadowlands, and remind them of the inevitable.

nodes.name: Icebound Fortitude
nodes.description: Your blood freezes, granting immunity to Stun effects and reducing all damage you take by 30% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Death Strike
nodes.description: Focuses dark power into a strike that deals 54 Physical damage and heals you for 20.00% of all damage taken in the last 5 sec, minimum 7.0% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Raise Dead
nodes.description: Raises a ghoul to fight by your side.  You can have a maximum of one ghoul at a time. Lasts 1 min.

nodes.name: Runic Attenuation
nodes.description: Auto attacks have a chance to generate 3 Runic Power.

nodes.name: Improved Death Strike
nodes.description: Death Strike's cost is reduced by 10, and its healing is increased by 60%.

nodes.name: Mind Freeze
nodes.description: Smash the target's mind with cold, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Blinding Sleet
nodes.description:
Targets in a cone in front of you are blinded, causing them to wander disoriented for 5 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

When Blinding Sleet ends, enemies are slowed by 50% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Gloom Ward
nodes.description: Absorbs are 15% more effective on you.

choices.name: March of Darkness
choices.description: Death's Advance grants an additional 25% movement speed over the first 3 sec.

choices.name: Wraith Walk
choices.description:
Embrace the power of the Shadowlands, removing all root effects and increasing your movement speed by 70% for 4 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect.

While active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 170%.

nodes.name: Unholy Momentum
nodes.description: Increases Haste by 2%.

nodes.name: Control Undead
nodes.description: Dominates the target undead creature up to level 71, forcing it to do your bidding for 5 min.

nodes.name: Enfeeble
nodes.description: Your ghoul's attacks have a chance to apply Enfeeble, reducing the enemies movement speed by 30% and the damage they deal to you by 12% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Coldthirst
nodes.description: Successfully interrupting an enemy with Mind Freeze grants 10 Runic Power and reduces its cooldown by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Proliferating Chill
nodes.description: Chains of Ice affects 1 additional nearby enemy.

nodes.name: Permafrost
nodes.description: Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

nodes.name: Veteran of the Third War
nodes.description: Stamina increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Death Pact
nodes.description: Create a death pact that heals you for 50% of your maximum health, but absorbs incoming healing equal to 30% of your max health for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Brittle
nodes.description: Your diseases have a chance to weaken your enemy causing your attacks against them to deal 6% increased damage for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Blood Bond
nodes.description: While you are below 50% health, your Ghoul sacrifices 4% of its maximum health to heal you for 1% of your maximum health every sec.

nodes.name: Icy Talons
nodes.description: Your Runic Power spending abilities increase your melee attack speed by 6% for 10 sec, stacking up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Death Notes
nodes.description: Raise Ally costs 30 less Runic Power.

nodes.name: Anti-Magic Zone
nodes.description: Places an Anti-Magic Zone for 6 sec, reducing the magic damage taken by party or raid members by 15%.

nodes.name: Death Defiance
nodes.description: The cooldown of Death Pact is reduced by 30 sec, and you receive 50% increased healing while its healing absorb is active.

nodes.name: Unholy Bond
nodes.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Runeforge effects by 20%.

nodes.name: Ice Prison
nodes.description: Chains of Ice now also roots enemies for 4 sec but its cooldown is increased to 12 sec.

choices.name: Asphyxiate
choices.description: Lifts the enemy target off the ground, crushing their throat with dark energy and stunning them for 5 sec.

choices.name: Death's Reach
choices.description:
Increases the range of Death Grip by 10 yds.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Death Grip.

nodes.name: Assimilation
nodes.description: The cooldown of Anti-Magic Zone is reduced by 60 sec and its duration is increased by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Anti-Magic Barrier
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Anti-Magic Shell by 20 sec and increases its duration and amount absorbed by 40%.

nodes.name: Grip of the Dead
nodes.description: Death and Decay reduces the movement speed of enemies within its area by 90%, decaying by 10% every sec.

nodes.name: Suppression
nodes.description: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 3%. When suffering a loss of control effect, this bonus is increased by an additional 6% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Blood Scent
nodes.description: Increases Leech by 3%.

nodes.name: Unholy Endurance
nodes.description: Increases Lichborne duration by 2 sec and reduces the cooldown by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Osmosis
nodes.description: Anti-Magic Shell increases healing received by 15%.

nodes.name: Insidious Chill
nodes.description: Your auto-attacks reduce the target's auto-attack speed by 5% for 30 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

nodes.name: Runic Protection
nodes.description: Your chance to be critically struck is reduced by 3% and your Armor is increased by 6%.

nodes.name: Blood Draw
nodes.description:
When you fall below 30% health you drain 42 health from nearby enemies, the damage you take is reduced by 10% and your Death Strike cost is reduced by 10 for 8 sec.

Can only occur every 2 min.

nodes.name: Rune Mastery
nodes.description: Consuming a Rune has a chance to increase your Strength by 3% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Subduing Grasp
nodes.description: When you would pull an enemy, the damage they deal to you is reduced by 6% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Will of the Necropolis
nodes.description: Damage taken below 30% Health is reduced by 20%.

nodes.name: Null Magic
nodes.description: Magic damage taken is reduced by 8% and the duration of harmful Magic effects against you are reduced by 35%.

nodes.name: Unyielding Will
nodes.description: Anti-Magic Shell now removes all harmful magical effects when activated, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.

nodes.name: Death's Echo
nodes.description: Death's Advance, Death and Decay, and Death Grip have 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Vestigial Shell
nodes.description: Casting Anti-Magic Shell grants 2 nearby allies a Lesser Anti-Magic Shell that Absorbs up to 148 magic damage and reduces the duration of harmful Magic effects against them by 50%.

nodes.name: Heart Strike
nodes.description: Instantly strike the target and 1 other nearby enemy, causing 55 Physical damage, and reducing enemies' movement speed by 20% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Marrowrend
nodes.description:
Smash the target, dealing 51 Physical damage and generating 3 charges of Bone Shield.

 Bone Shield
Surrounds you with a barrier of whirling bones, increasing Armor by 110. Each melee attack against you consumes a charge. Lasts 30 sec or until all charges are consumed.

nodes.name: Blood Boil
nodes.description:
Deals 57 Shadow damage and infects all enemies within 10 yds with Blood Plague.

 Blood Plague
A shadowy disease that drains 93 health from the target over 24 sec.

nodes.name: Vampiric Blood
nodes.description: Embrace your undeath, increasing your maximum health by 30% and increasing all healing and absorbs received by 30% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Bone Collector
nodes.description:
When you would pull an enemy generate 1 charge of Bone Shield.

 Bone Shield
Surrounds you with a barrier of whirling bones, increasing Armor by 110. Each melee attack against you consumes a charge. Lasts 30 sec or until all charges are consumed.

nodes.name: Ossuary
nodes.description:
While you have at least 5 Bone Shield charges, the cost of Death Strike is reduced by 5 Runic Power.

Additionally, your maximum Runic Power is increased by 10.

nodes.name: Improved Vampiric Blood
nodes.description: Vampiric Blood's healing and absorb amount is increased by 5% and duration by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Heart Strike
nodes.description: Heart Strike damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Relish in Blood
nodes.description: While Crimson Scourge is active, your next Death and Decay heals you for 10 health per Bone Shield charge and you immediately gain 10 Runic Power.

nodes.name: Leeching Strike
nodes.description: Heart Strike heals you for 0.25% health for each enemy hit while affected by Blood Plague.

nodes.name: Heartbreaker
nodes.description: Your Heart Strike generates 2 additional Runic Power per target hit.

nodes.name: Foul Bulwark
nodes.description: Each charge of Bone Shield increases your maximum health by 1%.

nodes.name: Dancing Rune Weapon
nodes.description:
Summons a rune weapon for 8 sec that mirrors your melee attacks and bolsters your defenses.

While active, you gain 25% parry chance.

nodes.name: Hemostasis
nodes.description: Each enemy hit by Blood Boil increases the damage and healing done by your next Death Strike by 8%, stacking up to 5 times.

nodes.name: Perseverance of the Ebon Blade
nodes.description: When Crimson Scourge is consumed, you gain 6% Versatility for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Bloodworms
nodes.description:
Your auto attacks have a chance to summon a Bloodworm.

Bloodworms deal minor damage to your target for 15 sec and then burst, healing you for 15% of your missing health.

If you drop below 50% health, your Bloodworms will immediately burst and heal you.

choices.name: Gorefiend's Grasp
choices.description: Shadowy tendrils coil around all enemies within 15 yards of a hostile or friendly target, pulling them to the target's location and Silencing them for 3 sec.

choices.name: Abomination Limb
choices.description:
Sprout an additional limb, pulling enemies further than 8 yds from you every 1 sec.  

The same enemy can only be pulled once every 4 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Bone Shield
nodes.description: Bone Shield increases your Haste by 10% and it can stack 2 additional times.

nodes.name: Insatiable Blade
nodes.description: Dancing Rune Weapon's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec and now generates 5 Bone Shield charges.

nodes.name: Deadly Reach
nodes.description: Death Strike hits an additional 2 enemies at 75% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Rapid Decomposition
nodes.description:
Your Blood Plague and Death and Decay deal damage 15% more often.

Additionally, your Blood Plague leeches 50% more Health.

nodes.name: Boiling Point
nodes.description: Heart Strike has a chance to make your next Blood Boil empowered, dealing 50% increased damage and echoing after 3 sec.

nodes.name: Lifeblood
nodes.description: Death Strike heals for an additional 20% of its healing over 5 sec.

nodes.name: Everlasting Bond
nodes.description: Summons 1 additional copy of Dancing Rune Weapon and increases its duration by 4 sec.

nodes.name: Voracious
nodes.description: Death Strike's healing is increased by 5% and grants you 12% Leech for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Blood Feast
nodes.description: Anti-Magic Shell heals you for 100% of the damage it absorbs.

nodes.name: Plague Infusion
nodes.description: Your Blood Plague critical hits have a chance to reduce the cooldown of your Blood Boil by 0.25 sec.

nodes.name: Bloody Reflection
nodes.description: While Blood Shield is active, taking direct damage reflects 38 Shadow damage back to the attacker. Blood Shield can now absorb up to 65% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Iron Heart
nodes.description: Blood Shield's duration is increased by 2 sec and it absorbs 20% more damage.

nodes.name: Bloodied Blade
nodes.description:
Parrying an attack grants you a charge of Bloodied Blade, increasing your Strength by 0.5%, up to 4.0% for 15 sec.

At 8 stacks, your next parry consumes all charges to unleash a Heart Strike at 300% effectiveness, and increases your Strength by 10% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Coagulopathy
nodes.description: Enemies affected by Blood Plague take 5% increased damage from you and Death Strike increases the damage of your Blood Plague by 10% for 15 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

nodes.name: Blood Mist
nodes.description:
When you cast Dancing Rune Weapon, you become enveloped in a blood mist that surrounds you for 8 sec, increasing your Parry by 5%. 

Deals 22 Shadow damage every 1 sec to enemies within 10 yds. Every time it deals damage you gain 2 Runic Power, up to a maximum of 10 Runic Power. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Sanguine Ground
nodes.description: You deal 6% more damage and receive 5% more healing while standing in your Death and Decay.

nodes.name: Bloodshot
nodes.description: While Blood Shield is active, you deal 8% increased damage.

nodes.name: Consumption
nodes.description:
Empower the runes in your weapon, reducing the damage you take over the duration and unleashing a devastating attack that deals 218 Shadow damage and consumes up to 75% of your Blood Plague instantly from enemies in front of you.

I: Consumes up to 25% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 5% and an additional 8 sec after empowering.

II: Consumes up to 50% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 10% and an additional 4 sec after empowering.

III: Consumes up to 75% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 15% and an additional 2 sec after empowering.

nodes.name: Red Thirst
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown on Vampiric Blood by 2.0 sec per 10 Runic Power spent.

nodes.name: Sanguinary Burst
nodes.description: When Blood Mist ends it deals 95 Shadow damage to 8 nearby enemies, healing you for 15% of the damage dealt. The damage is increased by 2% for every 1 Runic Power spent while Blood Mist was active.

nodes.name: Purgatory
nodes.description:
An unholy pact that prevents fatal damage, instead absorbing incoming healing equal to the damage prevented, lasting 3 sec.

If any healing absorption remains when this effect expires, you will die. This effect may only occur every 4 min.

nodes.name: Carnage
nodes.description:
Consumption now contributes to your Mastery: Blood Shield.

Each time an enemy strikes your Blood Shield, the cooldown of Consumption has chance to be reset.

nodes.name: Umbilicus Eternus
nodes.description: After Vampiric Blood expires, you absorb damage equal to 5 times the damage your Blood Plague dealt during Vampiric Blood.

ranks.description: While Dancing Rune Weapon is active, Parrying an attack has a chance to make your next Heart Strike cost no Runes and deal 150% increased damage.
For each Dancing Rune Weapon active your damage is increased by 0% and your damage taken is reduced by 0%.
When you consume a Rune you have a chance to call a Dancing Rune Weapon to your aid for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Infliction of Sorrow
nodes.description: When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your plagues, it extends the duration of the plagues by 3.0 sec, and deals 10% of the remaining damage to the enemy.

nodes.name: Incite Terror
nodes.description:
Vampiric Strike and Scourge Strike cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec.

Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Inevitable
nodes.description: Your plagues deal up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health.

nodes.name: The Blood is Life
nodes.description:
Dark Transformation summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec.

Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 25% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Blood-Soaked Ground
choices.description: While you are within your Death and Decay, your physical damage taken is reduced by 5% and your chance to gain Vampiric Strike is increased by 5%.

choices.name: Desecrate
choices.description: Death and Decay deals its damage 100% faster.

nodes.name: Vampiric Strike
nodes.description:
Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 25% chance to make your next Scourge Strike become Vampiric Strike.

Vampiric Strike heals you for 2% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 1.0%, up to 5.0% for 20 sec.

nodes.name: Gift of the San'layn
nodes.description:
While Dark Transformation is active you gain Gift of the San'layn.

Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 200%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your Scourge Strike for the duration.

choices.name: Pact of the San'layn
choices.description: You store 10% of all Shadow damage dealt into your Blood Beast to explode for additional damage when it expires.

choices.name: Sanguine Scent
choices.description: Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health.

choices.name: Vampiric Aura
choices.description:
Your Leech is increased by 2%.

While Lichborne is active, the Leech bonus of this effect is increased by 100%, and it affects 4 allies within 12 yds.

choices.name: Bloody Fortitude
choices.description:
Icebound Fortitude reduces all damage you take by up to an additional 20% based on your missing health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor reduces the cooldown of Icebound Fortitude by 3 sec.

choices.name: Newly Turned
choices.description: Raise Ally revives players at full health and grants you and your ally an absorb shield equal to 20% of your maximum health.

choices.name: Vampiric Speed
choices.description:
Death's Advance and Wraith Walk movement speed bonuses are increased by 10%.

Activating Death's Advance or Wraith Walk increases 4 nearby allies movement speed by 20% for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Frenzied Bloodthirst
nodes.description: Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil and Death Strike by 5%, and Epidemic by 5% per stack.

nodes.name: Transfusion
nodes.description:
Vampiric Strike increases the damage of your Dancing Rune Weapons by 20% for 8 sec. 

Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: Thrill of Blood
nodes.description:
Essence of the Blood Queen additionally increases your Mastery by 1.0% per stack.

Blood Plague deals 5% increased damage.

nodes.name: Visceral Strength
nodes.description: When Sudden Doom is consumed, you gain 4% Strength for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Swift and Painful
nodes.description:
If no enemies are struck by Soul Rupture, you gain 10% Strength for 8 sec.

Wave of Souls is 100% more effective on the main target of your Reaper's Mark.

nodes.name: Grim Reaper
nodes.description:
Reaper's Mark initial strike grants Killing Machine.

Reaper's Mark explosion deals up to 30% increased damage based on your target's missing health.

choices.name: Pact of the Deathbringer
choices.description:
When you suffer a damaging effect equal to 25% of your maximum health, you instantly cast Death Pact at 50% effectiveness. May only occur every 2 min.

When a Reaper's Mark explodes, the cooldowns of this effect and Death Pact are reduced by 5 sec.

choices.name: Rune Carved Plates
choices.description: Each Rune spent reduces the magic damage you take by 1.5% and each Rune generated reduces the physical damage you take by 1.5% for 5 sec, up to 5 times.

nodes.name: Wave of Souls
nodes.description:
Reaper's Mark sends forth bursts of Shadowfrost energy and back, dealing 34 Shadowfrost damage both ways to all enemies caught in its path.

Wave of Souls critical strikes cause enemies to take 5% increased Shadowfrost damage for 15 sec, stacking up to 2 times, and it is always a critical strike on its way back.

nodes.name: Bind in Darkness
nodes.description:
Rime empowered Howling Blast deals 60% increased damage to its main target, and is now Shadowfrost.

Shadowfrost damage applies 2 stacks to Reaper's Mark and 4 stacks when it is a critical strike.

choices.name: Death's Messenger
choices.description: Reduces the cooldowns of Lichborne and Raise Dead by 30 sec.

choices.name: Expelling Shield
choices.description: When an enemy deals direct damage to your Anti-Magic Shell, their cast speed is reduced by 10% for 6 sec.

choices.name: Dark Talons
choices.description:
Consuming Killing Machine or Rime has a 25% chance to grant 3 stacks of Icy Talons and increase its maximum stacks by the same amount for 6 sec.

Runic Power spending abilities count as Shadowfrost while Icy Talons is active.

choices.name: Reaper's Onslaught
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Reaper's Mark by 15 sec, but the amount of Obliterates and Frostscythes empowered by Exterminate is reduced by 1.

nodes.name: Wither Away
nodes.description: Frost Fever deals its damage 100% faster, and the second scythe of Exterminate applies Frost Fever.

nodes.name: Soul Rupture
nodes.description: When Reaper's Mark explodes, it deals 20% of the damage dealt to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Reaper's Mark
nodes.description:
Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing 109 Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark.

Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing 14 damage per stack.

Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

nodes.name: Exterminate
nodes.description:
After Reaper's Mark explodes, your next 2 Obliterates or Frostscythes cost 1 Rune and summon 2 scythes to strike your enemies.

The first scythe strikes your target for 184 Shadowfrost damage and the second scythe strikes all enemies around your target for 74 Shadowfrost damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Echoing Fury
nodes.description:
Reaper's Mark deals 5% increased damage.

Casting Dancing Rune Weapon grants 1 stack of Exterminate with 100% first scythe and 100% second scythe effectiveness.

nodes.name: Deathly Blows
nodes.description: Death Strike damage increased by 12%.

nodes.name: Frigid Resolve
nodes.description:
The effectiveness of Permafrost is increased by 100% and Exterminate grants Permafrost equal to 10% of the damage dealt.

Permafrost
Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

frost.description: An icy harbinger of doom, channeling runic power and delivering vicious weapon strikes. Preferred Weapons: Dual Axes, Maces, Swords

left.name: Rider of the Apocalypse
left.description: Riders of the Apoclypse call forth the power of the legendary Four Horsemen. They can call upon the Horsemen for aid and tap into the powers of death, famine and disease.

right.name: Deathbringer
right.description: Become the emissary of death. Aim for the soul of your enemies with attacks empowered by the Shadowlands, and remind them of the inevitable.

nodes.description: Your blood freezes, granting immunity to Stun effects and reducing all damage you take by 30% for 8 sec.

choices.description: Lifts the enemy target off the ground, crushing their throat with dark energy and stunning them for 5 sec.

choices.description:

nodes.description: Increases Leech by 3%.

Can only occur every 2 min.

nodes.name: Will of the Necropolis
nodes.description: Damage taken below 30% Health is reduced by 20%.

nodes.name: Null Magic
nodes.description: Magic damage taken is reduced by 8% and the duration of harmful Magic effects against you are reduced by 35%.

nodes.name: Unyielding Will
nodes.description: Anti-Magic Shell now removes all harmful magical effects when activated, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.

nodes.name: Death's Echo
nodes.description: Death's Advance, Death and Decay, and Death Grip have 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Vestigial Shell
nodes.description: Casting Anti-Magic Shell grants 2 nearby allies a Lesser Anti-Magic Shell that Absorbs up to 148 magic damage and reduces the duration of harmful Magic effects against them by 50%.

nodes.name: Frost Strike
nodes.description: Chill your weapon with icy power and quickly strike the enemy, dealing 46 Frost damage.

nodes.name: Obliterate
nodes.description: A brutal attack that deals 41 Physical and 42 Frost damage.

nodes.name: Howling Blast
nodes.description:
Blast the target with a frigid wind, dealing 8 Frost damage to that foe, and reduced damage to all other enemies within 10 yards, infecting all targets with Frost Fever.

 Frost Fever
A disease that deals 59 Frost damage over 24 sec and has a chance to grant the Death Knight 4 Runic Power each time it deals damage.

nodes.name: Killing Machine
nodes.description: Your auto attack critical strikes have a chance to make your next Obliterate deal Frost damage and critically strike, or make your next Frostscythe critically strike for 4 times the normal damage.

nodes.name: Empower Rune Weapon
nodes.description: Drain the will of your enemy to empower your rune weapon, dealing 70 Shadowfrost damage and reduced damage to enemies nearby, gaining 40 Runic Power, and grants you Killing Machine.

nodes.name: Frostscythe
nodes.description:
A sweeping attack that strikes all enemies in front of you for 14 Frost damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. 

Consumes Killing Machine to have its critical strikes deal 4 times the normal damage.

nodes.name: Arctic Assault
nodes.description: Consuming Killing Machine fires a Glacial Advance through your target at 60% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Runic Overflow
nodes.description: Increases Frost Strike and Glacial Advance damage by 10%.

nodes.name: Frostbound Will
nodes.description: Consuming Rime reduces the cooldown of Empower Rune Weapon by 6 sec.

nodes.name: Runic Command
nodes.description:
Increases your maximum Runic Power by 10.

Increases Rune regeneration rate by 8%.

nodes.name: Biting Cold
nodes.description: Remorseless Winter damage is increased by 35%. The first time Remorseless Winter deals damage to 3 different enemies, you gain Rime.

nodes.name: Inexorable Assault
nodes.description:
Gain Inexorable Assault every 4 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

Obliterate consumes up to 3 stacks, dealing an additional 9 Frost damage for each stack consumed.

nodes.name: Frostreaper
nodes.description:
Obliterate deals 10% increased damage and has a chance to tether the souls of its target and a nearby enemy to yours.

Frost Strike severs the tethers, dealing 72 Shadowfrost damage to both foes.

nodes.name: Pillar of Frost
nodes.description: The power of frost increases your Strength by 30% for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Icy Onslaught
nodes.description:
Frost Strike and Glacial Advance now cause your next Frost Strike and Glacial Advance to deal 15% increased damage and cost 5 more Runic Power. 

This effect stacks until the next Runic Empowerment.

nodes.name: Gathering Storm
nodes.description: Each Rune spent during Remorseless Winter increases its damage by 10%, and extends its duration by 0.5 sec.

nodes.name: Murderous Efficiency
nodes.description: Consuming the Killing Machine effect has a 20% chance to grant you 1 Rune.

nodes.name: Rage of the Frozen Champion
nodes.description: Frost Strike and Glacial Advance have a 15% increased chance to trigger Rime and Howling Blast generates 8 Runic Power while Rime is active.

nodes.name: Enduring Strength
nodes.description: When Pillar of Frost expires, your Strength is increased by 8% for 6 sec. This effect lasts 2 sec longer, up to 20 sec, for each Obliterate and Frostscythe critical strike during Pillar of Frost.

nodes.name: Frozen Dominion
nodes.description:
Pillar of Frost now summons a Remorseless Winter that lasts 4 sec longer.

Each enemy Remorseless Winter damages grants you 5% Mastery, up to 26% for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Frigid Executioner
nodes.description: Runic Empowerment has a 25% chance to refund 1 additional Rune.

nodes.name: Howling Blades
nodes.description: Rime empowered Howling Blast unleashes 2 icy blades at its target that deal 8 Frost damage and have 15% chance to grant Killing Machine.

nodes.name: Cryogenic Chamber
nodes.description: When Howling Blast consumes Rime, 15% of the damage it deals is gathered into the next cast of Remorseless Winter, up to 20 times.

nodes.name: Frostwyrm's Fury
nodes.description: Summons a frostwyrm who breathes on all enemies within 40 yd in front of you, dealing 131 Frost damage, stunning enemies for 3 sec, and slowing movement speed by 50% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Everfrost
nodes.description:
Rime empowered Howling Blast deals 50% increased damage to secondary targets.

Remorseless Winter deals 6% increased damage to enemies it hits, stacking up to 10 times.

nodes.name: Northwinds
nodes.description:
Howling Blast now hits an additional target with maximum effectiveness. 

Rime increases Howling Blast damage done by an additional 75%.

nodes.name: Bonegrinder
nodes.description: Consuming Killing Machine grants 1% critical strike chance for 10 sec, stacking up to 5 times. At 5 stacks your next Killing Machine consumes the stacks and grants you 10% increased Frost damage for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Smothering Offense
nodes.description:
Your auto attack damage is increased by 10%. 

This amount is increased for each stack of Icy Talons you have and it can stack up to 2 additional times.

nodes.name: Avalanche
nodes.description: Casting Howling Blast with Rime active causes jagged icicles to fall on enemies nearby your target, applying Razorice and dealing 8 Frost damage.

nodes.name: Icebreaker
nodes.description: When empowered by Rime, Howling Blast deals 30% increased damage to your primary target.

nodes.name: Obliteration
nodes.description:
During Pillar of Frost, Frost Strike and Howling Blast always grant Killing Machine and have a 20% chance to generate a Rune.

Additionally during Pillar of Frost, Empower Rune Weapon causes your next Obliterate or Frostscythe to cost no Runes.

nodes.name: Icy Death Torrent
nodes.description: Your auto attack critical strikes have a chance to send out a torrent of ice dealing 37 Frost damage to enemies in front of you.

nodes.name: Shattering Blade
nodes.description:
When Frost Strike damages an enemy with 5 stacks of Razorice it will consume them to deal an additional 115% damage.

Frostbane consumes the Razorice on your main target to deal an additional 300% damage.

nodes.name: Hyperpyrexia
nodes.description: Your Runic Power spending abilities have a chance to additionally deal 30% of the damage dealt over 4 sec.

nodes.name: Killing Streak
nodes.description:
Obliterate and Frostscythe consume all Killing Machines to deal 25% increased critical strike damage and grant 1.5% Haste for 8 sec for each stack consumed.

Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: The Long Winter
nodes.description: While Pillar of Frost is active your auto-attack critical strikes increase its duration by 1 sec, up to a maximum of 4 sec.

nodes.name: Frostbane
nodes.description:
Each foe struck with Glacial Advance has a chance to transform your next Frost Strike into Frostbane. The chance increases with the number of Razorice stacks on the target.

Frostbane
Start a frozen onslaught that strikes twice, unleashing the chilling essence of winter, dealing 30 Frost damage to all enemies caught in its wake with each strike.

Each enemy struck reduces the damage dealt to the next foe by 5%, down to 40%.

nodes.name: Breath of Sindragosa
nodes.description:
Call upon Sindragosa's aid in battle for 8 sec, continuously dealing 48 Frost damage every 1 sec to enemies in a cone in front of you. Consuming Killing Machine or Rime increases the duration by 0.8 sec. Deals reduced damage to secondary targets.

Grants a charge of Empower Rune Weapon at the start and 2 Runes at the end.

ranks.description: Frostwyrm's Fury deals 100% increased damage to the first enemy it hits and grants you 15% Haste for 12 sec.

Frostwyrm's Fury extends the duration of an active Pillar of Frost by 2.0 sec.

Enduring Strength grants an additional 4% Strength.

All Frost damage increased by 10%.

Frostwyrm's Fury deals 100% increased damage. After the Frostwyrm flies away, you may cast Frostwyrm's Fury again to recall it at 50% effectiveness.

choices.name: Horsemen's Aid
choices.description:
While at your aid, the Horsemen will occasionally cast Anti-Magic Shell on you and themselves at 80% effectiveness.

You may only benefit from this effect every 45 sec.

choices.name: Pact of the Apocalypse
choices.description: When you take damage, 5% of the damage is redirected to each active horsemen.

nodes.name: Apocalypse Now
nodes.description: Army of the Dead and Frostwyrm's Fury call upon all 4 Horsemen to aid you for 20 sec.

choices.name: Fury of the Horsemen
choices.description: Every 50 Runic Power you spend extends the duration of the Horsemen's aid in combat by 1 sec, up to 5 sec.

choices.name: A Feast of Souls
choices.description: While you have 2 or more Horsemen aiding you, your  increased damage.

nodes.name: Hungering Thirst
nodes.description: The damage of your diseases and Death Coil are increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Whitemane's Famine
nodes.description: When Scourge Strike damages an enemy affected by Undeath it gains 1 stack and infects another nearby enemy.

nodes.name: Mawsworn Menace
nodes.description: Scourge Strike deals 15% increased damage and the cooldown of your Death and Decay is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Nazgrim's Conquest
nodes.description:
If an enemy dies while Nazgrim is active, the strength of Apocalyptic Conquest is increased by 3%.

Additionally, each Rune you spend increase its value by 1%.

choices.name: On a Paler Horse
choices.description: While outdoors you are able to mount your Acherus Deathcharger in combat.

choices.name: Death Charge
choices.description:
Call upon your Death Charger to break free of movement impairment effects.

For 10 sec, while upon your Death Charger your movement speed is increased by 100%, you cannot be slowed below 100% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks.

nodes.name: Trollbane's Icy Fury
nodes.description: Scourge Strike shatters Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing 36 Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Rider's Champion
nodes.description:
Spending Runes has a chance to call forth the aid of a Horsemen for 10 sec.

Mograine
Casts Death and Decay at his location that follows his position and extends the duration of your diseases by 1.0 sec whenever it deals damage.

Whitemane
Casts Undeath on your target dealing 2 Shadowfrost damage per stack every 3 sec, for 24 sec. Each time Undeath deals damage it gains a stack. Cannot be refreshed.

Trollbane
Casts Chains of Ice on your target slowing their movement speed by 40% and increasing the damage they take from you by 5% for 8 sec.

Nazgrim
While Nazgrim is active you gain Apocalyptic Conquest, increasing your Strength by 5%.

nodes.name: Mograine's Might
nodes.description: Your damage is increased by 5% and you gain  while inside Mograine's Death and Decay.

nodes.name: Unholy Armaments
nodes.description: The abilities that Horsemen cast deal 5% increased damage..

nodes.name: Let Terror Reign
nodes.description: Casting Death Coil or Epidemic orders Whitemane to cast her Death Coil or Epidemic alongside you at 125% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Ride or Die!
nodes.description: Dark Transformation summons forth Whitemane for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Swift and Painful
nodes.description:
If no enemies are struck by Soul Rupture, you gain 10% Strength for 8 sec.

Wave of Souls is 100% more effective on the main target of your Reaper's Mark.

nodes.name: Grim Reaper
nodes.description:
Reaper's Mark initial strike grants Killing Machine.

Reaper's Mark explosion deals up to 30% increased damage based on your target's missing health.

choices.name: Pact of the Deathbringer
choices.description:
When you suffer a damaging effect equal to 25% of your maximum health, you instantly cast Death Pact at 50% effectiveness. May only occur every 2 min.

When a Reaper's Mark explodes, the cooldowns of this effect and Death Pact are reduced by 5 sec.

choices.name: Rune Carved Plates
choices.description: Each Rune spent reduces the magic damage you take by 1.5% and each Rune generated reduces the physical damage you take by 1.5% for 5 sec, up to 5 times.

nodes.name: Wave of Souls
nodes.description:
Reaper's Mark sends forth bursts of Shadowfrost energy and back, dealing 34 Shadowfrost damage both ways to all enemies caught in its path.

Wave of Souls critical strikes cause enemies to take 5% increased Shadowfrost damage for 15 sec, stacking up to 2 times, and it is always a critical strike on its way back.

nodes.name: Bind in Darkness
nodes.description:
Rime empowered Howling Blast deals 60% increased damage to its main target, and is now Shadowfrost.

Shadowfrost damage applies 2 stacks to Reaper's Mark and 4 stacks when it is a critical strike.

choices.name: Death's Messenger
choices.description: Reduces the cooldowns of Lichborne and Raise Dead by 30 sec.

choices.name: Expelling Shield
choices.description: When an enemy deals direct damage to your Anti-Magic Shell, their cast speed is reduced by 10% for 6 sec.

choices.name: Dark Talons
choices.description:
Consuming Killing Machine or Rime has a 25% chance to grant 3 stacks of Icy Talons and increase its maximum stacks by the same amount for 6 sec.

Runic Power spending abilities count as Shadowfrost while Icy Talons is active.

choices.name: Reaper's Onslaught
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Reaper's Mark by 15 sec, but the amount of Obliterates and Frostscythes empowered by Exterminate is reduced by 1.

nodes.name: Wither Away
nodes.description: Frost Fever deals its damage 100% faster, and the second scythe of Exterminate applies Frost Fever.

nodes.name: Soul Rupture
nodes.description: When Reaper's Mark explodes, it deals 20% of the damage dealt to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Reaper's Mark
nodes.description:
Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing 109 Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark.

Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing 14 damage per stack.

Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

nodes.name: Exterminate
nodes.description:
After Reaper's Mark explodes, your next 2 Obliterates or Frostscythes cost 1 Rune and summon 2 scythes to strike your enemies.

The first scythe strikes your target for 185 Shadowfrost damage and the second scythe strikes all enemies around your target for 74 Shadowfrost damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Echoing Fury
nodes.description:
Reaper's Mark deals 5% increased damage.

Casting Dancing Rune Weapon grants 1 stack of Exterminate with 100% first scythe and 100% second scythe effectiveness.

nodes.name: Deathly Blows
nodes.description: Death Strike damage increased by 12%.

nodes.name: Frigid Resolve
nodes.description:
The effectiveness of Permafrost is increased by 100% and Exterminate grants Permafrost equal to 10% of the damage dealt.

Permafrost
Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

unholy.description: A master of death and decay, spreading infection and controlling undead minions to do their bidding. Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Axe, Mace, Sword

left.name: San'layn
left.description: San'layn excel at using blood and shadow magic to weaken their enemies and empower their own capabilities.

right.name: Rider of the Apocalypse
right.description: Riders of the Apoclypse call forth the power of the legendary Four Horsemen. They can call upon the Horsemen for aid and tap into the powers of death, famine and disease.

nodes.name: Icebound Fortitude
nodes.description: Your blood freezes, granting immunity to Stun effects and reducing all damage you take by 30% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Death Strike
nodes.description: Focuses dark power into a strike that deals 53 Physical damage and heals you for 20.00% of all damage taken in the last 5 sec, minimum 7.0% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Raise Dead
nodes.description: Raises a ghoul to fight by your side.  You can have a maximum of one ghoul at a time. Lasts 1 min.

nodes.name: Runic Attenuation
nodes.description: Auto attacks have a chance to generate 3 Runic Power.

nodes.name: Improved Death Strike
nodes.description: Death Strike's cost is reduced by 10, and its healing is increased by 60%.

nodes.name: Mind Freeze
nodes.description: Smash the target's mind with cold, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Blinding Sleet
nodes.description:
Targets in a cone in front of you are blinded, causing them to wander disoriented for 5 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

When Blinding Sleet ends, enemies are slowed by 50% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Gloom Ward
nodes.description: Absorbs are 15% more effective on you.

choices.name: March of Darkness
choices.description: Death's Advance grants an additional 25% movement speed over the first 3 sec.

choices.name: Wraith Walk
choices.description:
Embrace the power of the Shadowlands, removing all root effects and increasing your movement speed by 70% for 4 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect.

While active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 170%.

nodes.name: Unholy Momentum
nodes.description: Increases Haste by 2%.

nodes.name: Control Undead
nodes.description: Dominates the target undead creature up to level 71, forcing it to do your bidding for 5 min.

nodes.name: Enfeeble
nodes.description: Your ghoul's attacks have a chance to apply Enfeeble, reducing the enemies movement speed by 30% and the damage they deal to you by 12% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Coldthirst
nodes.description: Successfully interrupting an enemy with Mind Freeze grants 10 Runic Power and reduces its cooldown by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Proliferating Chill
nodes.description: Chains of Ice affects 1 additional nearby enemy.

nodes.name: Permafrost
nodes.description: Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

nodes.name: Veteran of the Third War
nodes.description: Stamina increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Death Pact
nodes.description: Create a death pact that heals you for 50% of your maximum health, but absorbs incoming healing equal to 30% of your max health for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Brittle
nodes.description: Your diseases have a chance to weaken your enemy causing your attacks against them to deal 6% increased damage for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Blood Bond
nodes.description: While you are below 50% health, your Ghoul sacrifices 4% of its maximum health to heal you for 1% of your maximum health every sec.

nodes.name: Icy Talons
nodes.description: Your Runic Power spending abilities increase your melee attack speed by 6% for 10 sec, stacking up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Death Notes
nodes.description: Raise Ally costs 30 less Runic Power.

nodes.name: Anti-Magic Zone
nodes.description: Places an Anti-Magic Zone for 6 sec, reducing the magic damage taken by party or raid members by 15%.

nodes.name: Death Defiance
nodes.description: The cooldown of Death Pact is reduced by 30 sec, and you receive 50% increased healing while its healing absorb is active.

nodes.name: Unholy Bond
nodes.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Runeforge effects by 20%.

nodes.name: Ice Prison
nodes.description: Chains of Ice now also roots enemies for 4 sec but its cooldown is increased to 12 sec.

choices.name: Asphyxiate
choices.description: Lifts the enemy target off the ground, crushing their throat with dark energy and stunning them for 5 sec.

choices.name: Death's Reach
choices.description:
Increases the range of Death Grip by 10 yds.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Death Grip.

nodes.name: Assimilation
nodes.description: The cooldown of Anti-Magic Zone is reduced by 60 sec and its duration is increased by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Anti-Magic Barrier
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Anti-Magic Shell by 20 sec and increases its duration and amount absorbed by 40%.

nodes.name: Grip of the Dead
nodes.description: Death and Decay reduces the movement speed of enemies within its area by 90%, decaying by 10% every sec.

nodes.name: Suppression
nodes.description: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 3%. When suffering a loss of control effect, this bonus is increased by an additional 6% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Blood Scent
nodes.description: Increases Leech by 3%.

nodes.name: Unholy Endurance
nodes.description: Increases Lichborne duration by 2 sec and reduces the cooldown by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Osmosis
nodes.description: Anti-Magic Shell increases healing received by 15%.

nodes.name: Insidious Chill
nodes.description: Your auto-attacks reduce the target's auto-attack speed by 5% for 30 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

nodes.name: Runic Protection
nodes.description: Your chance to be critically struck is reduced by 3% and your Armor is increased by 6%.

nodes.name: Blood Draw
nodes.description:
When you fall below 30% health you drain 42 health from nearby enemies, the damage you take is reduced by 10% and your Death Strike cost is reduced by 10 for 8 sec.

Can only occur every 2 min.

nodes.name: Rune Mastery
nodes.description: Consuming a Rune has a chance to increase your Strength by 3% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Subduing Grasp
nodes.description: When you would pull an enemy, the damage they deal to you is reduced by 6% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Will of the Necropolis
nodes.description: Damage taken below 30% Health is reduced by 20%.

nodes.name: Null Magic
nodes.description: Magic damage taken is reduced by 8% and the duration of harmful Magic effects against you are reduced by 35%.

nodes.name: Unyielding Will
nodes.description: Anti-Magic Shell now removes all harmful magical effects when activated, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.

nodes.name: Death's Echo
nodes.description: Death's Advance, Death and Decay, and Death Grip have 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Vestigial Shell
nodes.description: Casting Anti-Magic Shell grants 2 nearby allies a Lesser Anti-Magic Shell that Absorbs up to 148 magic damage and reduces the duration of harmful Magic effects against them by 50%.

nodes.name: Outbreak
nodes.description:
Inflicts the target with Dread Plague and Virulent Plague.

Dread Plague
A malicious plague that deals 153 Shadow damage over 24 sec. Explodes for 64 Shadow damage to nearby enemies and infects one when the host dies. Can only be applied to 1 host at a time.

Virulent Plague
An infectious plague that spreads to all nearby enemies, dealing 70 Shadow damage over 24 sec.

nodes.name: Scourge Strike
nodes.description:
An unholy strike that deals 46 Shadow damage and causing your plagues on the target to erupt, dealing their damage an additional time at 35% effectiveness.

Applies Virulent Plague or spreads it to a nearby enemy.

nodes.name: Sudden Doom
nodes.description: Dread Plague has a 35% chance to exhilarate you, making your next Death Coil or Epidemic cost 15 less Runic Power and deal 35% increased damage.

nodes.name: Clawing Shadows
nodes.description:
Shadows guide your strikes, increasing the damage of your Scourge Strike by 25%, and causing it to grant you Clawing Shadows up to 4 times.

For each stack of Clawing Shadows, your Scourge Strike chains to an additional enemy. Each subsequent chain deals 20% reduced damage.

nodes.name: Putrefy
nodes.description: Summon a Lesser Ghoul to strike the enemy for 82 Shadow damage and have them explode for 42 Shadow damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Dark Transformation
nodes.description:
Corrupt and evolve your Ghoul into a Monstrosity, greatly empowering its abilities for 15 sec.

Death Coil and Epidemic extends the duration of this effect by 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Foul Infections
nodes.description: Your diseases deal 10% more damage and have a 5% increased chance to critically strike.

choices.name: Plague Mastery
choices.description: Critical strike damage of your diseases is increased by 25%

choices.name: Grave Mastery
choices.description: Critical strike damage of your minions is increased by 15%

nodes.name: Necromancer's Cunning
nodes.description: When your Lesser Ghouls expire, they explode in viscera, dealing 15 Shadow damage to enemies nearby.

nodes.name: Ebon Fever
nodes.description: Plagues deal 15% more damage over time in 75% of their duration.

nodes.name: Festering Scythe
nodes.description:
Festering Strike now follows up with a Festering Scythe that costs no Runes.

Festering Scythe
Slashes through all enemies within 14 yds in front of you, dealing 36 Shadow damage and hastening all of your plagues on targets hit to deal damage 35% faster for 25 sec.

nodes.name: Superstrain
nodes.description: Dread Plague deals damage to an additional nearby enemy at 75% effectiveness and has a chance to grant you 4 Runic Power.

nodes.name: Soul Reaper
nodes.description:
Rupture the soul of your enemy, dealing 159 Shadowfrost damage and causing the foe to take 20% increased damage from your diseases and minions for 8 sec.

Only usable on enemies below 35% maximum health.

Consumes up to 2 available charges to cast Putrefy.

nodes.name: Magus of the Dead
nodes.description: Dark Transformation and Army of the Dead summon a Magus of the Dead who hurls Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts at your foes for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Infected Claws
nodes.description: The infected claws of your ghouls have a chance to sicken the foe, dealing 7 Shadow damage over 12 sec. When reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new effect.

nodes.name: Cycle of Death
nodes.description:
Putrefy reduces the cooldown of Death and Decay by 1.0 sec.

Death and Decay reduces the cooldown of Putrefy by 0.3 sec for each enemy it damages, up to 3.0 sec.

nodes.name: Coil of Devastation
nodes.description: Death Coil deals 10% increased damage and causes the target to take an additional 30% of the direct damage dealt over 4 sec.

nodes.name: Army of the Dead
nodes.description:
Summons a legion of 8 empowered Lesser Ghouls that last for 15 sec to swarm your enemies.

Generates 40 Runic Power.

nodes.name: Reaping
nodes.description:
Scourge Strike, Festering Strike, and Death Coil deal 30% additional damage to enemies below 35% health.

Dark Transformation resets Soul Reaper's cooldown and allows it to be used on any target.

nodes.name: Menacing Magus
nodes.description: Your Magus of the Dead Shadow Bolt now fires a volley of Shadow Bolts at up to 8 nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Ghoulish Frenzy
nodes.description: Dark Transformation increases the attack speed and damage of you and your Monstrosity by 5% for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Morbidity
nodes.description: Diseased enemies take 1% increased damage from you per disease they are affected by.

nodes.name: Harbinger of Doom
nodes.description:
Sudden Doom triggers 30% more often and can accumulate up to 2 charges.

Summoning a Lesser Ghoul with Scourge Strike reduces the cooldown of Putrefy by 2.5 sec.

choices.name: Raise Abomination
choices.description: Army of the Dead now raises an Abomination for 30 sec to attack enemies while emitting a disease cloud, dealing 12 Plague damage to nearby enemies every 2 sec.

choices.name: Summon Gargoyle
choices.description:
Army of the Dead now summons a Gargoyle into the battlefield to bombard your enemies for 25 sec.

The Gargoyle gains 1% increased damage for every 1 Runic Power you spend and always critically strikes.

nodes.name: Unholy Devotion
nodes.description:
Putrefy causes your permanent Ghoul to go on an unholy frenzy, increasing its attack speed and energy regeneration by 25% for 12 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: All Will Serve
nodes.description:
Raise Dead summons an additional skeletal archer at your command that shoots Blighted Arrows.

Blighted Arrow
An unholy arrow that deals 11 Shadow damage. When consuming Sudden Doom, your Death Coil commands your archer to fire an additional Blighted Arrow at 80% effectiveness. Epidemic will instead cause Blighted Arrow to ricochet and hit up to 5 additional targets.

nodes.name: Blightburst
nodes.description:
The explosion effect of Putrefy extends the duration of your plagues by 4.5 sec and deals 35% of the damage they would deal over that time instantly.

Putrefy now applies your plagues to unaffected targets.

nodes.name: Putrid Echoes
nodes.description: Putrefy deals 20% increased damage, has 2 additional charges and consumes up to 2 available charges.

nodes.name: Doomed Bidding
nodes.description: Consuming Sudden Doom summons forth a Lesser Ghoul to assist you for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Scourging
nodes.description:
Scourge Strike now causes your Plagues to erupt at 50% effectiveness.

Clawing Shadows can now stack 1 additional times.

nodes.name: Ancient Power
nodes.description:
Spending Runic Power increases your Strength by 0.15% for 20 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: Unholy Aura
nodes.description: Each Magus of the Dead under your command grants you 1.0% Haste.

nodes.name: Commander of the Dead
nodes.description:
Dark Transformation empowers your Gargoyle, Abomination, Magus and Lesser Ghouls for 30 sec, increasing their damage by 15%.

The duration of Lesser Ghouls are increased by 25% of your Mastery.

nodes.name: Blightfall
nodes.description:
Dark Transformation grants access to Blightfall.

Blightfall
Consume 100% of your plagues around you and deal 100% of their remaining damage instantly.

Grants 1 charge of Putrefy.

nodes.name: Reanimation
nodes.description:
When you Putrefy a Lesser Ghoul, it has a 100% chance to reanimate as a Magus of the Dead who hurls Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts at your foes for 15 sec.

Magus of the Dead Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts deal 25% increased damage.

nodes.name: Outnumber
nodes.description:
Each Lesser Ghoul increases the damage of your permanent Ghoul by 10%, and Dark Transformation additionally empowers the Claw attacks of your Lesser Ghouls to Sweeping Claws.

Sweeping Claws
Rakes an enemy with deformed claws, dealing 24 Shadow damage to the target and 16 Shadow damage to nearby enemies.

ranks.description:
Army of the Dead siphons the power of the fallen, transforming Death Coil and Epidemic into Necrotic Coil and Graveyard for 30 sec.

Necrotic Coil
Unleash a vortex of necrotic energy and bone, dealing 76 Shadowstrike damage up to 3 foes and 24 Shadow damage to all pierced enemies.

Graveyard
The dead erupt beneath all foes with Virulent Plague, dealing 33 Shadow damage and 13 Shadow damage to enemies nearby.

Putrefy causes your next 1 Scourge Strike to summon a Lesser Ghoul, and grants you 3% Mastery for 12 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

Each Magus of the Dead under your command increases the damage of Necrotic Coil and Graveyard by 8%.

Dread Plague has a 20% chance to rouse the dead, causing a Lesser Ghoul to unearth and leap at the target to Putrefy at 60% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Infliction of Sorrow
nodes.description: When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your plagues, it extends the duration of the plagues by 3.0 sec, and deals 10% of the remaining damage to the enemy.

nodes.name: Incite Terror
nodes.description:
Vampiric Strike and Scourge Strike cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec.

Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Inevitable
nodes.description: Your plagues deal up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health.

nodes.name: The Blood is Life
nodes.description:
Dark Transformation summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec.

Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 25% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Blood-Soaked Ground
choices.description: While you are within your Death and Decay, your physical damage taken is reduced by 5% and your chance to gain Vampiric Strike is increased by 5%.

choices.name: Desecrate
choices.description: Death and Decay deals its damage 100% faster.

nodes.name: Vampiric Strike
nodes.description:
Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 25% chance to make your next Scourge Strike become Vampiric Strike.

Vampiric Strike heals you for 2% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 1.0%, up to 5.0% for 20 sec.

nodes.name: Gift of the San'layn
nodes.description:
While Dark Transformation is active you gain Gift of the San'layn.

Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 200%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your Scourge Strike for the duration.

choices.name: Pact of the San'layn
choices.description: You store 10% of all Shadow damage dealt into your Blood Beast to explode for additional damage when it expires.

choices.name: Sanguine Scent
choices.description: Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health.

choices.name: Vampiric Aura
choices.description:
Your Leech is increased by 2%.

While Lichborne is active, the Leech bonus of this effect is increased by 100%, and it affects 4 allies within 12 yds.

choices.name: Bloody Fortitude
choices.description:
Icebound Fortitude reduces all damage you take by up to an additional 20% based on your missing health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor reduces the cooldown of Icebound Fortitude by 3 sec.

choices.name: Newly Turned
choices.description: Raise Ally revives players at full health and grants you and your ally an absorb shield equal to 20% of your maximum health.

choices.name: Vampiric Speed
choices.description:
Death's Advance and Wraith Walk movement speed bonuses are increased by 10%.

Activating Death's Advance or Wraith Walk increases 4 nearby allies movement speed by 20% for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Frenzied Bloodthirst
nodes.description: Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil and Death Strike by 5%, and Epidemic by 5% per stack.

nodes.name: Transfusion
nodes.description:
Vampiric Strike increases the damage of your Dancing Rune Weapons by 20% for 8 sec. 

Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: Thrill of Blood
nodes.description:
Essence of the Blood Queen additionally increases your Mastery by 1.0% per stack.

Blood Plague deals 5% increased damage.

nodes.name: Visceral Strength
nodes.description: When Sudden Doom is consumed, you gain 4% Strength for 5 sec.

choices.name: Horsemen's Aid
choices.description:
While at your aid, the Horsemen will occasionally cast Anti-Magic Shell on you and themselves at 80% effectiveness.

You may only benefit from this effect every 45 sec.

choices.name: Pact of the Apocalypse
choices.description: When you take damage, 5% of the damage is redirected to each active horsemen.

nodes.name: Apocalypse Now
nodes.description: Army of the Dead and Frostwyrm's Fury call upon all 4 Horsemen to aid you for 20 sec.

choices.name: Fury of the Horsemen
choices.description: Every 50 Runic Power you spend extends the duration of the Horsemen's aid in combat by 1 sec, up to 5 sec.

choices.name: A Feast of Souls
choices.description: While you have 2 or more Horsemen aiding you, your  increased damage.

nodes.name: Hungering Thirst
nodes.description: The damage of your diseases and Death Coil are increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Whitemane's Famine
nodes.description: When Scourge Strike damages an enemy affected by Undeath it gains 1 stack and infects another nearby enemy.

nodes.name: Mawsworn Menace
nodes.description: Scourge Strike deals 15% increased damage and the cooldown of your Death and Decay is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Nazgrim's Conquest
nodes.description:
If an enemy dies while Nazgrim is active, the strength of Apocalyptic Conquest is increased by 3%.

Additionally, each Rune you spend increase its value by 1%.

choices.name: On a Paler Horse
choices.description: While outdoors you are able to mount your Acherus Deathcharger in combat.

choices.name: Death Charge
choices.description:
Call upon your Death Charger to break free of movement impairment effects.

For 10 sec, while upon your Death Charger your movement speed is increased by 100%, you cannot be slowed below 100% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks.

nodes.name: Trollbane's Icy Fury
nodes.description: Scourge Strike shatters Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing 36 Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Rider's Champion
nodes.description:
Spending Runes has a chance to call forth the aid of a Horsemen for 10 sec.

Mograine
Casts Death and Decay at his location that follows his position and extends the duration of your diseases by 1.0 sec whenever it deals damage.

Whitemane
Casts Undeath on your target dealing 2 Shadowfrost damage per stack every 3 sec, for 24 sec. Each time Undeath deals damage it gains a stack. Cannot be refreshed.

Trollbane
Casts Chains of Ice on your target slowing their movement speed by 40% and increasing the damage they take from you by 5% for 8 sec.

Nazgrim
While Nazgrim is active you gain Apocalyptic Conquest, increasing your Strength by 5%.

nodes.name: Mograine's Might
nodes.description: Your damage is increased by 5% and you gain  while inside Mograine's Death and Decay.

nodes.name: Unholy Armaments
nodes.description: The abilities that Horsemen cast deal 5% increased damage..

nodes.name: Let Terror Reign
nodes.description: Casting Death Coil or Epidemic orders Whitemane to cast her Death Coil or Epidemic alongside you at 125% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Ride or Die!
nodes.description: Dark Transformation summons forth Whitemane for 6 sec.
